title: Bridge Essay: Metacognitive ability correlates with hippocampal and prefrontal microstructure.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dashboard Diagnosis** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Metacognition — self-awareness, self-monitoring, neural correlates of meta-awareness.

**Metacognitive ability correlates with hippocampal and prefrontal microstructure.**. Neuroimage.. PMID: 28179164. DOI: 10.1016/j.neuroimage.2017.02.008. The ability to introspectively evaluate our experiences to form accurate metacognitive beliefs, or insight, is an essential component of decision-making. Previous research suggests individuals vary substantially in their level of insight, and that this variation is related to brain volume and function, particularly in the anterior prefrontal cortex (aPFC).
